display.purpose: Screen titles and auth headers only.

label.purpose: Form labels, button chrome, and metadata.

shadows.name: soft
shadows.purpose: Lightweight rows and subtle active surfaces.

motion.name: state-feedback
motion.purpose: Pressed, focus, loading, and state changes only.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main task action for registration, enrollment, profile completion, and scanner decisions.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { min-height: 52px; padding: 12px 20px; border: 1px solid #12B8A6; border-radius: 999px; background: #12B8A6; color: #FFFFFF; font-family: Montserrat, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; line-height: 24px; font-weight: 700; text-align: center; box-shadow: 0 10px 28px rgba(18,184,166,0.18); transition: opacity 180ms ease-out, transform 180ms ease-out; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #0F9F90; border-color: #0F9F90; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid rgba(18,184,166,0.32); outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:active { opacity: 0.86; transform: scale(0.99); }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Back, alternate, and secondary actions that should not compete with the primary task.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { min-height: 52px; padding: 12px 20px; border: 1px solid #C4D4DD; border-radius: 999px; background: #FFFFFF; color: #102033; font-family: Montserrat, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; line-height: 24px; font-weight: 700; text-align: center; transition: background 180ms ease-out, transform 180ms ease-out; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: #F8FBFC; } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid rgba(18,184,166,0.28); outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-secondary:active { transform: scale(0.99); }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { min-height: 52px; padding: 12px 20px; border: 1px solid #D8E4EA; border-radius: 999px; background: #F8FBFC; color: #12B8A6; font-family: Montserrat, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; line-height: 24px; font-weight: 700; text-align: center; transition: background 180ms ease-out, transform 180ms ease-out; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: #EEF7F8; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid rgba(18,184,166,0.28); outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-ghost:active { transform: scale(0.99); }

components.name: Text Field
components.description: Large mobile input with visible label, optional required mark, and clear error state.
components.css: .ds-field { display: grid; gap: 8px; font-family: Montserrat, Arial, sans-serif; color: #102033; } .ds-field-label { font-size: 14px; line-height: 20px; font-weight: 600; } .ds-field-label strong { color: #E24B5F; } .ds-input { min-height: 54px; border: 1px solid #D8E4EA; border-radius: 18px; background: #FFFFFF; color: #102033; padding: 12px 20px; font: 400 16px/24px Montserrat, Arial, sans-serif; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #516173; } .ds-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: #12B8A6; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(18,184,166,0.16); }

components.name: Phone Field
components.description: International phone row with fixed country code and flexible phone number field.
components.html: Phone *
components.css: .ds-phone { display: grid; gap: 8px; font-family: Montserrat, Arial, sans-serif; color: #102033; } .ds-phone-label { font-size: 14px; line-height: 20px; font-weight: 600; } .ds-phone-label strong { color: #E24B5F; } .ds-phone-row { display: flex; align-items: flex-start; gap: 12px; min-height: 58px; } .ds-country { width: 128px; min-height: 56px; border: 1px solid #D8E4EA; border-radius: 14px; background: #FFFFFF; color: #102033; font: 600 14px/20px Montserrat, Arial, sans-serif; } .ds-phone-input { flex: 1; min-width: 0; min-height: 54px; border: 1px solid #D8E4EA; border-radius: 18px; background: #FFFFFF; color: #102033; padding: 12px 20px; font: 400 16px/24px Montserrat, Arial, sans-serif; } .ds-phone-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: #12B8A6; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(18,184,166,0.16); }

components.name: Task Card
components.description: Primary white panel for forms, tickets, event summaries, and grouped workflows.
components.html:
Workshop registration

Confirm your attendance and ticket status.
components.css: .ds-card { border: 1px solid #D8E4EA; border-radius: 18px; background: #FFFFFF; color: #102033; padding: 20px; box-shadow: 0 12px 22px rgba(29,57,80,0.09); font-family: Montserrat, Arial, sans-serif; } .ds-card h3 { margin: 0 0 8px; font-size: 19px; line-height: 28px; font-weight: 700; } .ds-card p { margin: 0; color: #516173; font-size: 16px; line-height: 24px; }

components.name: Status Badge
components.description: Compact backend-owned state label for payment, ticket, certificate, scanner, and enrollment status.
components.css: .ds-status-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; min-height: 30px; padding: 4px 12px; border: 1px solid rgba(197,138,24,0.34); border-radius: 999px; background: rgba(197,138,24,0.12); color: #C58A18; font-family: Montserrat, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; line-height: 16px; font-weight: 700; }

narrative.overview: AMG Academy should feel like the trusted digital passport for a dentist's professional learning life: polished enough for a medical devices company, clear enough for event-day pressure, and energetic enough to support workshops, congresses, courses, tickets, and certificates.
keyCharacteristics: Clinical light surfaces with teal action color and AMG brand restraint.
One-font product typography using Montserrat across headings, labels, inputs, and buttons.
Pill actions and badges paired with moderately rounded cards and inputs.
Status-first language for payment, tickets, certificates, scanning, and access.
Mobile-first spacing with safe keyboard behavior and clear required-field marks.

rules.name: The Teal Means Action Rule
rules.body: AMG Teal is for action, selection, focus, and confirmed status. Do not spend it on decoration.

rules.name: The No Gloom Rule
rules.body: Dark appearance may use slate surfaces, but heavy near-black screens are prohibited for form-heavy flows.

rules.name: The One Family Rule
rules.body: Do not add display fonts, script fonts, or decorative type. The product earns trust by making Montserrat work well.

rules.name: The No Decorative Glass Rule
rules.body: Do not use blur or glassmorphism as a default surface treatment.

dos: Do keep AMG Teal scarce and meaningful: primary actions, selected state, focus, and validated success cues.
Do use the light clinical palette as the default experience for form-heavy flows.
Do mark required form fields with a visible asterisk and keep optional professional metadata visually optional.
Do write error messages that name the fix, especially for login, Google profile completion, payment, scanner, and certificate states.
Do preserve backend authority in UI copy: payment, eligibility, QR, course access, and certificates must read as server-confirmed.
donts: Don't use heavy near-black interfaces that make forms and event flows feel gloomy or hard to read.
Don't make the product look like a generic SaaS dashboard.
Don't use decorative glassmorphism, blur panels, or glossy cards as a default visual system.
Don't over-round cards, sections, or inputs beyond the token scale.
Don't ship vague errors like "Something went wrong" when a form, session, or API state can be explained.
Don't use childish learning-app styling, cluttered promotional layouts, or flashy event visuals that make AMG feel less medical or less trustworthy.
